name: A most fantastic New Year to you all!
description:
A 'New Year' is upon us, dearest friends! Let us celebrate this annual miracle!

Thusly, I, Quixote, or Don Quixote; 'Don' as a signifier of mine nobility, (Yes, Sancho, I simply must present myself as such.) do declare that tonight, we shall all celebrate tonight's activities with, hear ye, hear ye...

Bottles of champagne!


Oh, and fret not, my dearest Family! Hemobars shall and will be supplied en masse! After all, such a joyous moment of celebration is complimented and merely enhanced by a grand feast!
As for our equally valued human companions and guests, I have sourced some peculiar choices that Bari has assured me will be in your liking.
So, come hither, friends and Family! Celebrate this night and this eve, and embrace the new year!
creator: Don Quixote of La Manchaland
